regime_fall.current_status: The Iranian regime faces unprecedented military devastation with 12,300+ targets destroyed and sustained B-52 strikes on critical infrastructure, while the newly appointed Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei responds with hardline security appointments and defiant rhetoric despite emerging diplomatic channels suggesting potential negotiations. Mixed signals persist as Iran simultaneously denies ceasefire talks while U.S. envoys report progress, with Trump announcing a 2-3 week timeline to conclude Operation Epic Fury.
regime_fall.last_major_event: President Trump announced an impending end to Operation Epic Fury within 2-3 weeks as U.S. and Israeli strikes intensified on April 1-2, 2026, with CENTCOM reporting over 12,300 targets hit, 155+ Iranian vessels destroyed, and B-52 bomber strikes on Isfahan and overland Iranian targets targeting nuclear facilities and defense infrastructure.
